headline: Transcript: Why Microsoft needs nuclear energy
summary: Michela Tindera talks to Sam Fleming and Jamie Smyth
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the FT News Briefing podcast episode: ‘Why Microsoft needs nuclear energy’

Michela Tindera Good morning from the Financial Times. Today is Friday, December 20th, and this is your FT News Briefing.

Hedge funds are making big bucks off crypto’s “Trump bump”. The Bank of England isn’t ready for another interest rate cut just yet. Plus, we look at why one utility is teaming up with Microsoft to revive a controversial nuclear site.

Jamie Smyth If the tech giants can’t get the power to enable their data centres to work, then they and America will not be leading the AI revolution.

Michela Tindera I’m Michela Tindera, and here’s the news you need to start your day.

[MUSIC PLAYING]

A handful of hedge funds are cashing in on the crypto frenzy. Funds investing in digital assets have posted returns of 76 per cent this year so far. This majorly outpaces the average hedge fund. They gain just 10 per cent, according to data group HFR. The asset managers made a win
